PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will and the codocil. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated 12/23/09 and the codocil dated 8/30/13 are admitted to probate. Debra Dolch is appointed as the Administrator with Will Annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for February 27, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Cristobal. Matter not reported.
